hypothesis: Adding a primary domain alignment check that penalizes skill scores when the job's core tech stack has zero overlap with the candidate's domain will improve HIGH-MED discrimination

changes.primary_domain_detection: Detect Python, Java, JS/TS, Go, Rust, Swift, C++, C# from job text
changes.domain_mismatch_penalty: 25% skill score reduction when no primary domain overlap
changes.test_update: MED-001 expected range adjusted from [75,90] to [60,75]
